spec.objective: Add a Vendor field to SubagentConfig and LevelConfig in the v1alpha1 API types — CEL-validated (enum: anthropic | openai), optional, defaults to empty-string (resolved to 'anthropic' at dispatch time by ResolveProvider). Regenerate zz_generated.deepcopy.go and config/crd/bases/tideproject.k8s_projects.yaml via make generate manifests. No controller logic, no chart, no cmd/ changes — pure schema surface that plan-02-vendor-dispatch-wire depends on.
